title: Core ETS BIFs — new, insert, lookup, delete, member, info
purpose: This brief registers the fundamental ETS BIFs that create tables, insert data, look up entries, and query table metadata. Every OTP module that uses ETS calls these functions. Without them, `ets:new`, `ets:insert`, and `ets:lookup` are unresolved imports.
task: Implement 8 core ETS BIFs in a new `native/ets_bifs.rs` file.

requirements.title: ets:new/2
requirements.spec: Register `ets:new/2`. Accepts (Name, Options). Returns table ID (or Name atom for named tables).
acceptance: Options list parsed: type (set/ordered_set/bag/duplicate_bag, default set), access (public/protected/private, default protected), named_table, {keypos, N}
Creates table in registry, sets calling process as owner
Named tables: name atom is returned and used for subsequent lookups
Unnamed tables: integer table ID returned
Duplicate named table returns badarg
Test: `ets:new(my_table, [set, public, named_table])` creates a public set table

requirements.title: ets:insert/2 and ets:lookup/2
acceptance: `ets:insert(Tab, Tuple)` inserts a single tuple, returns true
`ets:insert(Tab, [Tuple1, Tuple2, ...])` inserts multiple tuples, returns true
`ets:lookup(Tab, Key)` returns list of matching tuples (empty list if none)
Access control enforced (protection level)
Test: insert and lookup round-trip for set, bag, ordered_set

requirements.title: ets:delete/1, ets:delete/2, ets:member/2
acceptance: `ets:delete(Tab)` deletes the entire table, returns true. Only owner can delete.
`ets:delete(Tab, Key)` deletes all entries with key, returns true
`ets:member(Tab, Key)` returns true/false
Test: insert, member returns true, delete key, member returns false

requirements.title: ets:info/1, ets:info/2
acceptance: `ets:info(Tab)` returns a proplist of all table metadata: name, type, size, keypos, protection, owner, memory
`ets:info(Tab, Item)` returns a single info item value
`size` returns current entry count
`memory` returns approximate word count
Non-existent table returns `undefined`
Test: create table, insert entries, verify info(size) matches

boundaries: SHALL NOT implement ets:match or ets:select — those need match specs (B-096/B-097)
SHALL NOT implement ets:tab2list or ets:foldl — those are B-095
SHALL NOT implement ets:give_away or heir — that's B-099
verification: cargo test -p beamr passes with all tests green
